calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Continued To Aug-01-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-01-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Neveo Mosser.
Plaintiff's witness: Alexandra Kotlyarovra, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Raymond Garth Malone.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 640 Clay St., #217, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,012.44
Waived Costs.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF NEVEO MOSSER
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAYMOND GARTH MALONE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

JUDGE:OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
